rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSE VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2016, Line 2: Defendant's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. DENIED without prejudice, premature. The action is not yet moot as the decision in Stitt (CPF-15-514608) is not yet final. No judgment was entered per CCP 438(h)(3) and no form of judgment was ever presented to the Court for execution. There is no Notice of Entry of order on file, i.e. the time for appeal is governed by CRC 8.104(a)(1)(C) and 8.104(c)(3). Standing issue is not yet final, Notice of Appeal filed on July 12, 2016 in CUD-15-654006. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA SUE CATRON VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2016, Line 3: DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., AND HSBC BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to August 25, 2016. Moving party is order to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the operative complaint and reply. (The Court is in receipt of two courtesy copies of the moving papers). Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to Department 501 no late than July 29, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 3015-3017 SAN BRUNO LLC VS. KENNY JENTONS ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2016, Line 4: DEFENDANT KENNY JENTONS' Motion For Order To Continue Trial Date. GRANTED. Trial is continued to August 8, 2016. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YING XU VS. MAN ZHU JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Sec 1717
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 21, 2016, Line 5: DEFENDANTS MAN JIANG AND MING LAU'S Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs Pursuant To CCP Sec 1717. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and establish the existence of contractual provision for attorney's fees by competent admissible evidence. =(501/REQ)
